name: LG Monitor Controls
author: Ty Smith

descriptions.en_US: Control monitor inputs, PBP, brightness, volume, and more via ddcutil DDC/CI. Tested on LG 45GX950A — other DDC/CI monitors may work but compatibility varies. Contributions and monitor profiles welcome!
